progress_summary: Follow-up to the v1.4.3 release (PR #272): the Playwright e2e changelog-and-scenarios.spec.ts asserted the v1.4.2 hero (#v1-4-2.hero-card--released), which the release demoted to a rel-card — so the 'Site — Playwright e2e' job failed. Updated the spec to assert the new v1.4.3 hero (#v1-4-3, hero-ver v1.4.3, compat-box) + refreshed the docstring. vitest stays 345/345 (e2e is a separate Playwright job, not run locally — no browsers in this container — so CI re-run validates). No other e2e spec referenced the v1.4.2 hero.
next_actions: CI re-runs on push; confirm the Playwright e2e job goes green.
Then v1.4.3 is ready to merge + manually deploy (deploy:staging → eyeball → deploy) to activate Codex.

last_run.tests: vitest 345/345; e2e fix validated by CI (no local browsers)
